title: NPCs
description: Manage non-player characters in your game
noNpcs: No NPCs found. Create your first NPC to get started.
searchPlaceholder: Search NPCs by name or slug...
name: Name
deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
attributesDescription: Manage NPC attributes and their values
skillsDescription: Manage NPC skills and their levels
addFirstAttribute: Click the button above to add your first attribute
addFirstSkill: Click the button above to add your first skill

dialogues.title: Dialogues
dialogues.description: Dialogues triggered when interacting with this NPC
dialogues.addDescription: Link an existing dialogue to this NPC
dialogues.addFirst: Click the button above to link the first dialogue

fields.priorityDescription: Higher value = checked first. If condition passes, this dialogue is used.
fields.conditionDescription: Optional condition group for when this dialogue should be available

positionNotSet: No position set — assign coordinates in the edit form
positionDescription: Location and orientation in the game world

placements.title: World Placements
placements.description: Locations where this NPC is placed in the game world
placements.addDescription: Define a new location for this NPC in the world
placements.removeDescription: Are you sure you want to remove this placement? This action cannot be undone.
